whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed. If the list is empty, no devices will be excluded.

animationInterval.title: Animation Interval
animationInterval.description: Interval to refresh the devices (in seconds). Use 0 to disable the animation.

generator.title: Video Generator
generator.description: Select the WebRTC video source: none disables track injection, test generates SMPTE test bars, and webcam captures from the configured local webcam.

webcam.title: Webcam Device
webcam.description: OS-specific ffmpeg webcam identifier, such as /dev/video0 on Linux, 0 on macOS, or Integrated Camera on Windows.

webcamResolution.title: Webcam Resolution
webcamResolution.description: Resolution used when capturing from the configured webcam.

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable the debug for the plugin (development only)

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)
